PROFILE.name: Nijanthan Elangovan
PROFILE.summary: Technical Writer with 5+ years of experience creating documentation, SOPs, and user-facing content for global products. Currently writing Help Center articles, operational docs, and AI chatbot content for Google Ads, YouTube, and SA360 — with a bonus background in web development and UI design.

bullets: Authoring Help Center articles for Google Ads, SA360 & YouTube

EXPERIENCE.title: Senior Tech Writer Associate
bullets: Author external Help Center articles for Google Ads, SA360 & YouTube — built for clarity, accuracy, and localization across global audiences.
Develop internal SOPs and operational docs that power troubleshooting, escalation handling, and trust & safety workflows.
Optimize AI chatbot conversations so users get answers faster — fewer tickets, better outcomes.
Collaborate with PMs and UX Writers to ship launch communications for YouTube, DV360, Google Ads, and Policy & Billing.

EXPERIENCE.title: Content Writer & UI Designer
bullets: Wrote employee handbooks, project documentation, and marketing copy — the kind of content people actually referenced.
Authored and migrated web content — blogs, case studies — ensuring accessibility and industry standards.
Managed multiple websites, using analytics to track content performance and improve user engagement.
Also handled UI design for web platforms and social media creatives alongside the writing work.

EXPERIENCE.title: Web Developer & Content Producer
bullets: Produced and maintained content for 40+ websites — e-commerce, landing pages — each averaging 500k+ monthly views.
Ensured all content met compliance, accessibility, and SEO standards across the entire portfolio.
Combined web development skills with content strategy to improve search rankings and user engagement.

EXPERIENCE.title: Content & Marketing Intern
bullets: Wrote copy for social media campaigns and marketing materials across multiple platforms.
Created branding assets and promotional content — bridging writing and visual design for consistent messaging.

EXPERIENCE.title: Technical Content Writer
bullets: Developed technical content strategy and produced structured e-learning materials from scratch.
Managed the content pipeline end-to-end, collaborating with SMEs to ensure accuracy and relevance.

PROJECTS.title: Content at Scale — 40+ Websites
PROJECTS.blurb: Produced, structured, and maintained content across 40+ e-commerce and landing page sites — from product descriptions to compliance copy. Several properties crossed 500k+ monthly page views.

PROJECTS.title: E-learning Content — Website Learners
PROJECTS.blurb: Developed structured technical learning materials from scratch — strategy through production. Worked closely with SMEs to keep content accurate and engaging for a non-technical audience.

PROJECTS.title: OTT App — Content Architecture
PROJECTS.blurb: University project — defined the content structure and information hierarchy for an OTT streaming app, focusing on how users discover and navigate content on TV interfaces.
